// Package sample is a fixture package for rimsky-docs-sdk tests.
package sample

// MaxWidgets is the upper bound on widgets.
const MaxWidgets = 42

// Widget is an exported widget type.
type Widget struct {
	// Name of the widget.
	Name string
}

// NewWidget constructs a Widget.
func NewWidget(name string) *Widget {
	return &Widget{Name: name}
}

// Describe returns a description of the widget.
func (w *Widget) Describe() string {
	return "widget " + w.Name
}

// Greet is a package-level function.
func Greet(name string) string {
	return "hello " + name
}

// unexported should not appear in the reference.
func unexported() {}
